c.n: Number of collage templates and layouts
c.d: The total count of ready-made collage templates or layout options the app offers for users to create collages easily and quickly
The operating systems (iOS, Android, Windows) on which the app can be installed and used
Whether the app is free, freemium, subscription-based, or requires one-time payment
Range and quality of photo editing tools available within the app such as filters, text addition, cropping, background removal, and AI-powered enhancements
How intuitive and easy the app is to use for collage making, including support for automatic design suggestions and customization
Capabilities to share the created collages on social media, email, SMS or save in high quality formats
